leadText: Poni Wilds (Japanese: ポニの原野 Poni Wilderness) is a location on Poni Island in Alola, connecting to the Seafolk Village in the south and the Ancient Poni Path in the east.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] An NPC in the area says "We're going on a Berry hunt. We're going to find a big one!", a reference to the children's book We're Going on a Bear Hunt by Michael Rosen .
